    <h1 {...{
      "id": "aep-vega-sdk-integration-tutorial"
    }}>{`AEP Vega SDK integration tutorial`}</h1>
    <p>{`This document outlines the integration of Adobe Streaming Media for Edge Network on Vega OS-based Amazon Fire TV devices using the AEP Vega SDK. The AEP Vega SDK provides TypeScript packages (`}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`@adobe/vega-aepcore`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`@adobe/vega-aepmedia`}</inlineCode>{`) for sending Experience events and tracking media playback through the Adobe Experience Platform Edge Network.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "prerequisites"
    }}>{`Prerequisites`}</h2>
    <p>{`Before starting, ensure the following:`}</p>
    <ol>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Complete the `}<a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "/aep-mobile-sdkdocs/edge/media-for-edge-network#before-starting"
        }}>{`Adobe Streaming Media for Edge Network setup`}</a>{` including report suite definition, schema setup, dataset creation, and datastream configuration.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol"><a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "../edge-network/index.md#configure-the-edge-network-extension-in-data-collection-ui"
        }}>{`Configure the Edge extension`}</a>{` and `}<a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "../identity-for-edge-network/index.md#configure-the-identity-extension-in-the-data-collection-ui"
        }}>{`Edge Identity extension`}</a>{` in the Data Collection UI.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol"><a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "/aep-mobile-sdkdocs/edge/media-for-edge-network#configure-media-for-edge-network-extension-in-the-data-collection-tags"
        }}>{`Configure Media for Edge Network extension in Data Collection Tags`}</a>{`.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol">{`Have a working Vega React Native application where you will integrate the SDK.`}</li>
    </ol>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "install-the-aep-vega-sdk-packages"
    }}>{`Install the AEP Vega SDK packages`}</h2>
    <p>{`The AEP Vega SDK is distributed as npm packages. Install the required core and media packages:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-bash"
      }}>{`npm install @adobe/vega-aepcore @adobe/vega-aepmedia
`}</code></pre>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul"><a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "https://www.npmjs.com/package/@adobe/vega-aepcore"
        }}><strong parentName="a">{`@adobe/vega-aepcore`}</strong></a>{` provides the foundational APIs for configuration, identity, consent, and sending Experience events to the Edge Network.`}</li>
      <li parentName="ul"><a parentName="li" {...{
          "href": "https://www.npmjs.com/package/@adobe/vega-aepmedia"
        }}><strong parentName="a">{`@adobe/vega-aepmedia`}</strong></a>{` provides media-specific tracking APIs (session creation and media event tracking) built on top of the core package.`}</li>
    </ul>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "initialize-the-sdk"
    }}>{`Initialize the SDK`}</h2>
    <p>{`Initialize the AEP Vega SDK using `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AEPSDK.initialize()`}</inlineCode>{` with your Edge datastream ID and the Media extension registered.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="TypeScript" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "example"
    }}>{`Example`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-typescript"
      }}>{`import { AEPSDK, LogLevel } from '@adobe/vega-aepcore';
import { Media } from '@adobe/vega-aepmedia';

// Initialize the SDK with configuration and media extension
AEPSDK.initialize({
    config: {
        "edge.configId": "<YOUR_DATASTREAM_ID>"
    },
    logLevel: LogLevel.DEBUG,
    extensions: [Media.EXTENSION]
});
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "configuration-keys"
    }}>{`Configuration keys`}</h3>
    <table>
      <thead parentName="table">
        <tr parentName="thead">
          <th parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Key`}</th>
          <th parentName="tr" {...{

          }}>{`Required`}</th>
          <th parentName="tr" {...{

          }}>{`Description`}</th>
          <th parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Data Type`}</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody parentName="table">
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{

          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`edge.configId`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Yes`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`The datastream ID configured in the Adobe Experience Platform Data Collection UI.`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`String`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`edge.domain`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`No`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`A custom first-party domain mapped to the Adobe Edge Network domain.`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`String`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`consent.default`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`No`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Default consent preferences. An object with `}<inlineCode parentName="td">{`consents.collect.val`}</inlineCode>{` set to `}<inlineCode parentName="td">{`y`}</inlineCode>{` (yes), `}<inlineCode parentName="td">{`n`}</inlineCode>{` (no), or `}<inlineCode parentName="td">{`p`}</inlineCode>{` (pending).`}</td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Object`}</td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
    <InlineAlert variant="info" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`edge.configId`}</inlineCode>{` (datastream ID) must be provided in the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`config`}</inlineCode>{` object during `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AEPSDK.initialize()`}</inlineCode>{` or set via `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AEPSDK.updateConfiguration()`}</inlineCode>{` before calling any other SDK APIs. Without it, the SDK cannot send events to the Edge Network.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "update-configuration"
    }}>{`Update configuration`}</h2>
    <p>{`Use `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AEPSDK.updateConfiguration()`}</inlineCode>{` to update SDK configuration after initialization.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="TypeScript" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "example-1"
    }}>{`Example`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-typescript"
      }}>{`AEPSDK.updateConfiguration({
    "edge.domain": "your-company.data.adobedc.net"
});
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "set-log-level"
    }}>{`Set log level`}</h2>
    <p>{`Use the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AEPSDK.setLogLevel()`}</inlineCode>{` API with the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`LogLevel`}</inlineCode>{` enum to control the verbosity of SDK logs during development and debugging.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="TypeScript" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "example-2"
    }}>{`Example`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-typescript"
      }}>{`import { AEPSDK, LogLevel } from '@adobe/vega-aepcore';

// Set log level to VERBOSE for development
AEPSDK.setLogLevel(LogLevel.VERBOSE);

// Set log level to ERROR for production
// AEPSDK.setLogLevel(LogLevel.ERROR);
`}</code></pre>

      "id": "supported-log-levels"
    }}>{`Supported log levels`}</h3>

    <h2 {...{
      "id": "retrieve-the-experience-cloud-id"
    }}>{`Retrieve the Experience Cloud ID`}</h2>
    <p>{`The SDK automatically generates and manages the Experience Cloud ID (ECID) for device identification. Use `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AEPSDK.getExperienceCloudId()`}</inlineCode>{` to retrieve the current ECID. This API returns a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Promise`}</inlineCode>{` that resolves to the ECID string, or `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`null`}</inlineCode>{` if not yet available.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="TypeScript" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "example-3"
    }}>{`Example`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-typescript"
      }}>{`// Using async/await
const ecid = await AEPSDK.getExperienceCloudId();
if (ecid) {
    console.log("Experience Cloud ID: " + ecid);
}

// Using Promise
AEPSDK.getExperienceCloudId().then((ecid) => {
    if (ecid) {
        console.log("Experience Cloud ID: " + ecid);
    }
});
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "set-consent-preferences"
    }}>{`Set consent preferences`}</h2>
    <p>{`Use the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AEPSDK.setConsent()`}</inlineCode>{` API to send user consent preferences to the Edge Network following the Adobe 2.0 consent standard.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="TypeScript" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "example-4"
    }}>{`Example`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-typescript"
      }}>{`AEPSDK.setConsent({
    consent: [{
        standard: "Adobe",
        version: "2.0",
        value: {
            collect: { val: "y" },
            metadata: { time: new Date().toISOString() }
        }
    }]
});
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "send-experience-events"
    }}>{`Send Experience events`}</h2>
    <p>{`Use the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AEPSDK.sendEvent()`}</inlineCode>{` API to send custom Experience events (non-media) to the Edge Network. Events are structured using the XDM schema.`}</p>
    <p>{`For cases where you need the Edge Network response, use `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`AEPSDK.sendEventWithResponse()`}</inlineCode>{` which returns a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Promise`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="2" languages="TypeScript, TypeScript" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "sendevent"
    }}>{`sendEvent`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-typescript"
      }}>{`AEPSDK.sendEvent({
    xdm: {
        eventType: "page.view",
        someXdmKey: "someXdmValue"
    },
    data: {
        customKey: "customValue"
    }
});
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "sendeventwithresponse"
    }}>{`sendEventWithResponse`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-typescript"
      }}>{`try {
    const response = await AEPSDK.sendEventWithResponse({
        xdm: {
            eventType: "page.view",
            someXdmKey: "someXdmValue"
        },
        data: {
            customKey: "customValue"
        }
    });
    console.log("Response: " + JSON.stringify(response));
} catch (error) {
    console.error("SendEvent Error: " + error);
}
`}</code></pre>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "track-media-playback"
    }}>{`Track media playback`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "create-a-media-session"
    }}>{`Create a media session`}</h3>
    <p>{`Before tracking media playback events, create a media session using `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Media.createMediaSession()`}</inlineCode>{`. This establishes the tracking session on the Edge Network by sending a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`media.sessionStart`}</inlineCode>{` event with the required session details.`}</p>
    <InlineAlert variant="warning" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`Only one media session can be active at a time. You must end the current session (using `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`media.sessionComplete`}</inlineCode>{` or `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`media.sessionEnd`}</inlineCode>{`) before creating a new one.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="TypeScript" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "example-5"
    }}>{`Example`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-typescript"
      }}>{`import { Media } from '@adobe/vega-aepmedia';

Media.createMediaSession({
    xdm: {
        eventType: "media.sessionStart",
        mediaCollection: {
            playhead: 0,
            sessionDetails: {
                streamType: "video",
                friendlyName: "Episode 1 - Pilot",
                name: "episode-1",
                length: 3600,
                contentType: "vod",
                channel: "My App Channel",
                playerName: "Custom OTT Player"
            }
        }
    }
});
`}</code></pre>

    <h3 {...{
      "id": "send-media-events"
    }}>{`Send media events`}</h3>
    <p>{`Once a media session is created, use `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Media.sendMediaEvent()`}</inlineCode>{` to track media playback interactions. Each event requires an `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`eventType`}</inlineCode>{` and a `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`mediaCollection`}</inlineCode>{` object with the current `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`playhead`}</inlineCode>{` value.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="TypeScript" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "example-6"
    }}>{`Example`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-typescript"
      }}>{`import { Media } from '@adobe/vega-aepmedia';

// Signal that playback has started
Media.sendMediaEvent({
    xdm: {
        eventType: "media.play",
        mediaCollection: {
            playhead: 0
        }
    }
});

// Send periodic playhead updates (ping events) during playback
// These must be sent at least once per second
Media.sendMediaEvent({
    xdm: {
        eventType: "media.ping",
        mediaCollection: {
            playhead: 15
        }
    }
});

// Signal that playback has been paused
Media.sendMediaEvent({
    xdm: {
        eventType: "media.pauseStart",
        mediaCollection: {
            playhead: 30
        }
    }
});

// End the session when content finishes
Media.sendMediaEvent({
    xdm: {
        eventType: "media.sessionComplete",
        mediaCollection: {
            playhead: 3600
        }
    }
});
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "supported-media-event-types"
    }}>{`Supported media event types`}</h3>
    <table>

        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody parentName="table">
        <tr parentName="tbody">

            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`media.play`}</inlineCode></td>

            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Indicates media playback has started or resumed.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">

            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`media.pauseStart`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Indicates media playback has been paused.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`media.ping`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Periodic playhead update during active playback.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`media.bufferStart`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Indicates the media player has entered a buffering state.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`media.bitrateChange`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Indicates a change in the media bitrate.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`media.adBreakStart`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Signals the start of an ad break.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`media.adBreakComplete`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Signals the end of an ad break.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`media.adStart`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Signals the start of an individual ad.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`media.adComplete`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Signals the completion of an individual ad.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`media.adSkip`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Indicates an ad was skipped.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`media.chapterStart`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Signals the start of a content chapter.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`media.chapterComplete`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Signals the completion of a content chapter.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`media.chapterSkip`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Indicates a chapter was skipped.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`media.error`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Indicates a media playback error occurred.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`media.statesUpdate`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Indicates a player state change (for example, fullscreen, mute).`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`media.sessionComplete`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Signals the end of a media session when content has been viewed to completion.`}</td>
        </tr>
        <tr parentName="tbody">
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`media.sessionEnd`}</inlineCode></td>
          <td parentName="tr" {...{
            "align": "left"
          }}>{`Signals the end of a media session when the user abandons playback.`}</td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
    <InlineAlert variant="warning" slots="text" mdxType="InlineAlert" />
    <p>{`During active playback, media ping events (`}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`media.ping`}</inlineCode>{`) must be sent at least once per second with the current playhead value. Sessions that do not receive events for 10 minutes, or do not update the playhead for 30 minutes, are automatically timed out by the Edge Network.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "complete-integration-example"
    }}>{`Complete integration example`}</h2>
    <p>{`The following example demonstrates a complete media tracking workflow, from SDK initialization through a media playback session.`}</p>
    <CodeBlock slots="heading, code" repeat="1" languages="TypeScript" mdxType="CodeBlock" />
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "example-7"
    }}>{`Example`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-typescript"
      }}>{`import { AEPSDK, LogLevel } from '@adobe/vega-aepcore';
import { Media } from '@adobe/vega-aepmedia';

// 1. Initialize and configure the SDK
AEPSDK.initialize({
    config: {
        "edge.configId": "<YOUR_DATASTREAM_ID>"
    },
    logLevel: LogLevel.DEBUG,
    extensions: [Media.EXTENSION]
});

// 2. Set user consent
AEPSDK.setConsent({
    consent: [{
        standard: "Adobe",
        version: "2.0",
        value: {
            collect: { val: "y" },
            metadata: { time: new Date().toISOString() }
        }
    }]
});

// 3. Create a media session
Media.createMediaSession({
    xdm: {
        eventType: "media.sessionStart",
        mediaCollection: {
            playhead: 0,
            sessionDetails: {
                streamType: "video",
                friendlyName: "Episode 1 - Pilot",
                name: "episode-1",
                hasResume: false,
                length: 3600,
                contentType: "vod",
                channel: "My App Channel",
                playerName: "Custom OTT Player"
            }
        }
    }
});

// 4. Signal playback has started
Media.sendMediaEvent({
    xdm: {
        eventType: "media.play",
        mediaCollection: {
            playhead: 0
        }
    }
});

// 5. Track an ad break
Media.sendMediaEvent({
    xdm: {
        eventType: "media.adBreakStart",
        mediaCollection: {
            playhead: 30,
            advertisingPodDetails: {
                friendlyName: "Pre-roll Ads",
                index: 0,
                offset: 0
            }
        }
    }
});

Media.sendMediaEvent({
    xdm: {
        eventType: "media.adStart",
        mediaCollection: {
            playhead: 30,
            advertisingDetails: {
                friendlyName: "Ad 1",
                name: "ad-001",
                length: 15,
                podPosition: 1
            }
        }
    }
});

Media.sendMediaEvent({
    xdm: {
        eventType: "media.adComplete",
        mediaCollection: {
            playhead: 30
        }
    }
});

Media.sendMediaEvent({
    xdm: {
        eventType: "media.adBreakComplete",
        mediaCollection: {
            playhead: 30
        }
    }
});

// 6. Track a chapter
Media.sendMediaEvent({
    xdm: {
        eventType: "media.chapterStart",
        mediaCollection: {
            playhead: 30,
            chapterDetails: {
                friendlyName: "Chapter 1",
                index: 1,
                length: 600,
                offset: 30
            }
        }
    }
});

// 7. Continue sending playhead updates during playback
//    (must be sent at least once per second)
Media.sendMediaEvent({
    xdm: {
        eventType: "media.ping",
        mediaCollection: {
            playhead: 120
        }
    }
});

Media.sendMediaEvent({
    xdm: {
        eventType: "media.chapterComplete",
        mediaCollection: {
            playhead: 630
        }
    }
});

// 8. Complete the session when content finishes
Media.sendMediaEvent({
    xdm: {
        eventType: "media.sessionComplete",
        mediaCollection: {
            playhead: 3600
        }
    }
});
`}</code></pre>

    </MDXLayout>;
}
;
MDXContent.isMDXComponent = true;
